content.query:
/*******************************************************************************************************
  Author:       Rene Villarreal
  Create Date:  August 4, 2022
  Description:  Create view v_ShipmentsYTD_ConsumerDashboard
********************************************************************************************************
SUMMARY OF CHANGES

Date                    Author                    Comments
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
August 4, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Create original view
August 4, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Separated ECM segment by month for efficiency
********************************************************************************************************/


CREATE VIEW		v_ShipmentsYTD_ConsumerDashboard
AS

(
SELECT 			'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN 			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C on CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			YEAR(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = 2022
AND 			MONTH(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = MONTH(GETDATE())
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND 			CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL

SELECT 			'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN 			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C on CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			YEAR(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = 2022
AND 			MONTH(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND 			CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL

SELECT 			'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN 			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C on CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			YEAR(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = 2022
AND 			MONTH(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 2
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND 			CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL

SELECT 			'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN 			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C on CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			YEAR(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = 2022
AND 			MONTH(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 3
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND 			CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL

SELECT 			'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN 			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C on CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			YEAR(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = 2022
AND 			MONTH(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 4
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND 			CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL

SELECT 			'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN 			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C on CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			YEAR(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = 2022
AND 			MONTH(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 5
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND 			CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL

SELECT 			'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN 			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C on CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			YEAR(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = 2022
AND 			MONTH(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 6
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND 			CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL

SELECT 			'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN 			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C on CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			YEAR(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = 2022
AND 			MONTH(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 7
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND 			CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL

SELECT 			'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN 			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C on CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			YEAR(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = 2022
AND 			MONTH(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 8
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND 			CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL

SELECT 			'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN 			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C on CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			YEAR(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = 2022
AND 			MONTH(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 9
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND 			CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL

SELECT 			'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN 			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C on CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			YEAR(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = 2022
AND 			MONTH(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 10
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND 			CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL

SELECT 			'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN 			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C on CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			YEAR(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = 2022
AND 			MONTH(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 11
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND 			CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL

SELECT 			'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN 			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C on CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			YEAR(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = 2022
AND 			MONTH(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 12
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND 			CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL


SELECT 			 'Company L' as Company, 
  AC.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC2.Name as [Customer Name], 
  AC.Category as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO],
  'Zeroll' as [Brand],
  MStockCode as [Part ID], 
  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			SCL.SorMaster SM
JOIN 			SCL.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder=SD.SalesOrder
JOIN 			SCL.ArCustomerPlus AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCL.ArCustomer AC2 on SM.Customer = AC2.Customer
JOIN			SCL.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode
WHERE 			SD.MWarehouse in ('ZK', 'ZF', 'ZX')
AND 			YEAR(COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate)) = 2022
AND 			COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) <= DATEADD(DD, -1, DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )) + 1, 0))
AND 			MPrice*MOrderQty > 0
AND 			AC.Category <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			AC.Category <> 'GWT'
AND 			OrderStatus = '9'


UNION ALL


SELECT 			 'Company G' as Company, 
  AC.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC.Name as [Customer Name], 
  'GWT' as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO],
  CASE WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'CHEF' then 'Chefs Choice'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'EXCL' then 'Excalibur'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'OMEG' then 'Omega'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'VINT' then 'Vinturi'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'WEST' then 'WestBend'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'ZERO' then 'Zeroll'
  ELSE 'Yonanas' END as [Brand],
  MStockCode as [Part ID], 
  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			SCG.SorMaster SM
JOIN 			SCG.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder=SD.SalesOrder
JOIN 			SCG.InvMaster IM ON SD.MStockCode=IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer
WHERE 			YEAR(COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate)) = 2022
AND 			COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) <= DATEADD(DD, -1, DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )) + 1, 0))
AND 			MPrice*MOrderQty > 0
AND 			OrderStatus = '9'
AND   			IM.ProductClass IN ('CHEF', 'EXCL', 'OMEG', 'VINT', 'WEST', 'ZERO', 'YONA', 'YONP')
)
